rows.label: qev010502_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, an Earthling!
Looks like my luck hasn't completely run out yet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0002
rows.name:
Man, I got chased around by monsters,
ran out of ammo, lost my comm terminal,
and was completely at a loss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev010502_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell him Nathan asked you to come.

rows.label: qev010502_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev010502_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him Monica was worried about him.

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh, thanks for the polite explanation.
I can just picture their usual lovers' spat
and the leader looking totally lost.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0004
rows.name:
And that made you worry about me too?
It's fine, she always overreacts a bit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well... anyway, I should contact them soon
and put their minds at ease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0006
rows.name:
My bad, but could you go find my comm terminal?
I must have dropped it around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0007
rows.name:
Please, I'll make sure to reward you properly.
Alright? Come on.
Let's help each other out as fellow BLADEs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0008
rows.name:
If I dropped it while running away from the monsters,
the comm terminal must be somewhere around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0009
rows.name:
Please find it quickly before Monica
starts making a fuss about not hearing from me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0010
rows.name:
How'd it go? Did you find the comm terminal?
With that, I can get in touch with the leader right away,
no matter where they are.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ooh! Perfect job.
You seem to be quite skilled.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0012
rows.name:
A first-rate BLADE, completely different from me
making huge blunders in a place like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0013
rows.name: Hehe, let's keep helping each other out if anything happens, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0014
rows.name: ...Well then, I'll contact them right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0015
rows.name:
Here's a token of my gratitude.
Please, take it without hesitation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010502_MSG0016
rows.name:
Man, you really saved me!
Thanks to you, I managed to get in touch with my team.
The leaders will be coming to pick me up soon![ST:wait ]
